title: sorghastrum scaberrimum
intro: Sorghastrum scaberrimum, also known as big bluestem, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Sorghastrum scaberrimum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
